CONTENT: 1️⃣ Day 1 — Admin & Access
Collect laptop and equipment
Set up work email account
Configure two-factor authentication on all accounts
Request access to key systems and tools
Review and sign HR documents (contract
Set up payroll and bank details
Obtain building access pass / remote access credentials
2️⃣ Week 1 — People & Context
Meet your line manager and agree on initial priorities
Schedule introductory 1:1s with immediate team members
Review the team charter or working agreements
Understand the team structure and reporting lines
Learn the communication norms (Slack
Find out where documentation and knowledge is stored
Identify who to go to for common requests
3️⃣ Week 2–4 — Learning
Shadow a team member or attend a key meeting
Read key strategy or product documents
Review recent project history and outcomes
Understand how the team plans and tracks work
Identify recurring ceremonies (standups
Review open tickets or backlog items
Complete any mandatory training (compliance
4️⃣ Month 1–3 — Early Wins
Define 30 / 60 / 90 day goals with manager
Identify one quick win to deliver in first 30 days
Contribute meaningfully to one team initiative
Proactively share an observation or improvement idea
Request feedback from manager at 30-day mark
Request feedback from manager at 60-day mark
Request feedback from manager at 90-day mark
5️⃣ Ongoing — Relationships
Establish regular 1:1 cadence with manager
Build relationships with cross-functional partners
Find a mentor or buddy within the organisation
Join relevant internal communities or working groups
